hero.title: Ryan Gustavo
hero.subtitle: Hi, my name is Ryan Gustavo. I am a full-stack developer and ethical hacker passionate about software development.
hero.cta: Ready to deliver the best solutions

about.title: About me
about.subtitle: Software Development and Ethical Hacking
about.text1: Hi, my name is Ryan Gustavo and I'm currently a full-stack software developer in Aracaju, Sergipe.
about.text2: Since I was a child, I've been passionate about programming and hacking. I started programming in Lua at 13, which sparked my love for this profession.
about.text3: I also consider myself an ethical hacker, as I seek to help people by identifying critical flaws and vulnerabilities in their projects and applications.
about.text4: Currently, I'm focused on specializing in backend development, but I also have frontend knowledge. I dedicate myself daily to learning new things.

protl.title: PRorTL-AI
protl.description: Translation and proofreading facilitator for long texts based on the Google Gemini API. Offers terminal and GUI execution.

ubus.title: Ubus API
ubus.description: Robust API with advanced infrastructure: Docker, Nginx, PostgreSQL, and secrets managed via HashiCorp Vault. Full CI/CD with GitHub Actions.

obs.title: OBS AutoSegment
obs.description: Python automation tool for automatic segmentation of OBS Studio recordings, optimizing content creator workflows.

lunna.title: Lunna Backend
lunna.description: Discord bot backend based on Clean Architecture. Focused on scalability, maintainability, and solid design patterns.

sergipe.title: Sergipanidade Mobile
sergipe.description: Mobile app developed in React Native (Expo) during a Software Residency at UNIT, focusing on regional culture and user experience.

medusa.title: Medusa API
medusa.description: Headless Ecommerce API developed with Node.js and Medusa.js. Focused on performance, modularity, and developer experience.
